query_description: Calculate percentage of customers in each tier
business_context: Understand customer base composition - what % are premium vs standard

expected_columns.name: PERCENTAGE
expected_columns.description: Percentage of total customers (rounded to 1 decimal)

validation_notes: Results ordered by percentage DESC (highest first)
Percentages rounded to exactly 1 decimal place
Use 100.0 (float) not 100 (integer) for division to get decimals
Subquery (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) gives total count of 3
